title: Bunni - Rekt
relevance_summary: Custom Liquidity Distribution Function exploited via precise trades

prevention.rule: Block any tx that triggers rebalancing immediately after a swap with significant token ratio deviation.

red_flags: Rebalancing immediately after a swap with significant token ratio deviation
vulnerable_contracts: Bunni's custom Liquidity Distribution Function contracts
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that triggers rebalancing immediately after a swap with significant token ratio deviation.
summary: Bunni's custom Liquidity Distribution Function was exploited via precise trades that triggered rebalancing, draining pools and resulting in $8.4 million loss. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing rebalancing immediately after significant token ratio deviations.
